tools.name: analyze_domain
tools.description: Analyze a domain name to identify its operator and attribution signals. Returns a human-readable Markdown summary and machine-readable structured output containing ranked entity candidates with confidence scores and per-signal evidence.

tools.name: correlate_domains
tools.description: Correlate 2-15 domain names to detect shared infrastructure, common operators, and clustering evidence. Returns a human-readable Markdown summary and machine-readable structured output containing correlation clusters, pairwise scores, and shared signals.
